positive: A minimalist, highly detailed celestial geometric pattern overlaying a stylized mountain range silhouette. The composition must be centered and symmetrical, featuring deep midnight blues, vibrant electric cyan, and subtle metallic gold accents. Focus on clean lines, mandalic elements, and negative space. The geometric patterns should resemble constellation maps and crystalline structures, contrasting sharply against the smooth, monolithic shape of the mountain peaks. Flat graphic style mixed with ethereal glow effects. High contrast, perfect for direct apparel printing, suitable for a wide-view textile print. --ar 1:1 --style graphic --v 6.0
